notes: New creature filters on Valheim Data — Faction, Deals Damage, and Weak To. Filter all Mountain Monsters, all creatures that deal Poison, or all creatures weak to Fire. Click the Faction line on a creature detail to filter the list to that faction. Player Data portrait rebuilt — no more Barbie face; the Norse warrior look now uses weathered skin shading, war-paint stripes, strong brow + jaw, fur-lined leather shoulders, scar (male), braid/highlight detail in hair and beard. Duplicate portrait in the Equipment panel removed.
